creator: dor.bsd@xm0.uk
text:
Hi,

This patch should already be included in version of node_exporter in ports, via this bug from the beginning of February: https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=269154. The patch is also visible in the ports tree on GitHub.

I'm unsure why you wouldn't have an updated package available to you already.
If the currently available package really doesn't include the patch, someone may need to poke something to recreate the package.
